about.description: JCT Polytechnic College provides diploma-level technical education with a strong focus on practical training and industry readiness. The institution emphasizes skill development, hands-on workshops, and technical expertise for early career entry.

admissions.mode: Merit-based admission as per DOTE norms

eligibility.lateral-entry: As per Tamil Nadu DOTE rules

courses.name: Diploma in Electrical and Electronics Engineering

course_highlights.mechanical: Focus on workshops, manufacturing, and industrial machinery
course_highlights.civil: Construction, structural basics, and site-level engineering
course_highlights.eee: Electrical systems, circuits, and practical lab work

placements.description: The polytechnic supports students with skill-based training and industry exposure. Diploma students are prepared for both direct employment and higher studies through lateral entry.
highlights: Support for lateral entry to engineering

campus_life.environment: Practical-focused learning environment with strong emphasis on technical skills.

faq.a: The college offers diploma programs in Mechanical, Civil, Electrical, Petrochemical, and Agricultural Engineering.
Yes, the curriculum heavily focuses on workshops and hands-on training.

faq.q: Can I join engineering after diploma?
faq.a: Yes, students can pursue lateral entry into B.E./B.Tech programs.
Yes, hostel facilities are available for students.
